overview.description: The Digital Asset Debt Strategy ETF (DADS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in debit securities of companies globally involved in digital asset-related activities, including those holding digital assets in their corporate treasury. DADS was launched on Aug 4, 2025 and is issued by Alphabit.
